results.requirement: Archive v0.1.0 acceptance without rewriting its tag
results.detail: Six of six checksums verify; v0.1.0 resolves to 90439f66d2d2ddf656174bc33a34ffdacee2b41d.

results.requirement: Apply forward-only EPUB schema migration while preserving v0.1.0 rows
results.detail: Migration 0001 followed by 0002 retains existing Project, Source, Job, Step, Segment, QA, and Artifact data.

results.requirement: Inspect common valid EPUB 2 and EPUB 3 packages
results.detail: Container, OPF, manifest, spine, EPUB3 navigation, EPUB2 NCX, metadata, cover, resources, references, and safe external DOCTYPE behavior pass.

results.requirement: Select visible text and persist bounded stable locators
results.detail: Visible XHTML/nav/NCX/metadata policy, nested exclusions, Ruby handling, 1800-character parts, exact joiners, hashes, source documents, and locators pass.

results.requirement: Complete offline Mock EPUB Pipeline with Artifact lineage
results.detail: novel_epub_v1 succeeded with five ordered Steps, seven Artifacts, and source/job/manifest lineage.

results.requirement: Rebuild, reopen, and re-import a structure-preserving EPUB
results.command: acceptance generator plus pytest coverage suite
results.detail: EPUB3 sample translated 26 of 26 selected units, preserved six unchanged payloads byte-for-byte, retained a four-document reading order and nine resources, and reopened in target language en; separate EPUB2 round-trip tests pass.

results.requirement: Keep imported Sources immutable
results.detail: Original source bytes/checksums remain unchanged and overwrite or stale-manifest paths are rejected.

results.requirement: Pause, resume, cancel, retry, recover interruption, and reuse successful Segments
results.detail: EPUB-specific and retained v0.1.0 controls pass; completed Segments are not retransmitted and locator lineage survives retry/recovery.

results.requirement: Handle Provider failure with stable errors, logs, fallback, and retained successes
results.detail: Deterministic failures produce normalized partial results, source-text fallback, QA evidence, and retry only failed work.

results.requirement: Reject malformed, protected, unsafe, and ambiguous archives
results.detail: Non-ZIP, malformed XML, encryption, internal entities, traversal, duplicates, unsafe flags, control characters, NFC/casefold conflicts, and invalid EPUB navigation/language are rejected.

results.requirement: Enforce upload and archive resource limits
results.command: pytest coverage suite and resource measurement
results.detail: Upload bytes, member count, total/per-member expansion, compression ratio, path depth, chunked requests, and compressed-key inspection are covered.

results.requirement: Use bounded streaming upload, HTTP download, and CLI copies
results.command: pytest coverage suite and Compose HTTP download
results.detail: Chunked publication, multipart guard, file-based responses, atomic CLI copies, and matching HTTP Artifact checksums pass.

results.requirement: Share one application core and data store across GUI, CLI, and API
results.detail: Cross-interface durable data, typed models, OpenAPI routes, and stable 400/404/409/413/422 error envelopes pass.

results.requirement: Retain TXT workflow
results.detail: TXT Mock translation, QA, TXT/JSON export, checksum, download, and browser flow pass.

results.requirement: Retain manga workflow
results.command: acceptance generator, pytest coverage suite, and real-browser rerun
results.detail: Deterministic Mock CBZ generation, archive safety, unconfigured external Adapter behavior, and browser flow pass.

results.requirement: Keep runtime Provider keys out of persistent and public data
results.command: pytest coverage suite plus acceptance generator active-key guard
results.detail: Whole-test-data-root scans are clean after deliberate leaks; raw, UTF-16/32, and compressed EPUB imports containing the active key are rejected; generated acceptance is clean.

results.requirement: Build and smoke-test an installed Wheel with Web and migration resources
results.command: Wheel build, no-deps target install, and installed-package resource/TestClient probe
results.detail: Version 0.2.0, Web index, migrations 0001/0002, root page, and health response pass.

results.requirement: Pass real-Chromium GUI tests
results.detail: Two browser tests passed; the paid-Provider test alone skipped. Retained screenshots document TXT/manga, while the separate passing EPUB browser test provides EPUB GUI evidence.

results.requirement: Measure a representative larger EPUB within configured limits
results.detail: A 25307593-byte synthetic EPUB with 505 members inspected successfully; this is inspection-only observational evidence, not translation throughput or a compression-bomb test.

results.requirement: Build Docker image and prove isolated Compose health, security, download, and restart persistence
results.command: docker build, isolated docker compose up, loopback HTTP flow, restart, and down --volumes
results.detail: Linux/arm64 image 0.2.0 ran as 10001:10001 with read-only root and loopback port; Mock Job succeeded, HTTP hash matched before/after restart, and the test-only volume was removed.

results.requirement: Pass formatting, lint, strict typing, Python compile, and JavaScript syntax gates
results.command: Ruff format/check, mypy, compileall, and node --check
results.detail: All commands exited zero.

results.requirement: Pass complete automated suite with recorded coverage
results.detail: 149 passed, 3 skipped, 83 percent total branch-aware coverage.

results.requirement: Preserve product boundaries and update maintained documentation
results.command: repository tests and final diff inspection
results.detail: No user/auth/tenant model, standalone shared-core boundaries, immutable Sources, Artifact identities, capability-selected Adapters, loopback default, and runtime-only secrets remain intact.

skip_detail: generic browser test unless browser mode is enabled
EPUB browser test unless browser mode is enabled
real paid Provider test unless explicitly enabled

browser.screenshot_scope: Synthetic TXT and manga GUI flow; EPUB is covered by a separate passing Chromium test without retained screenshots.

resource_measurement.limitation: One cold macOS subprocess inspection; no Provider translation, reader rendering, or compression-bomb workload.

real Chromium synthetic normalized-failure GUI acceptance

checksum_only_artifacts.provenance: deterministic temporary fixture generated by tools/generate_v020_acceptance.py

optional_external_tests.name: Real paid OpenAI-compatible Provider
optional_external_tests.reason: No paid credential or cost was authorized.

optional_external_tests.name: Real manga-image-translator model/service
optional_external_tests.reason: The external model, GPU runtime, and fonts are operator-managed and intentionally not bundled.

optional_external_tests.name: External epubcheck
optional_external_tests.reason: Built-in structural/reference validation is required; the external validator is optional.

optional_external_tests.name: Native Windows and WSL2 runtime
optional_external_tests.reason: This run covered macOS arm64 and Linux/arm64 Docker.

limitations: The retained representative sample is EPUB3; EPUB2 support is established by separate automated fixtures.
Browser screenshots document synthetic TXT and manga flows; EPUB browser coverage is a separate passing Chromium test without retained screenshots.
Built-in EPUB validation is structural/reference-oriented and does not claim reader rendering equivalence.
The larger EPUB measurement is one cold-process inspection sample, not Provider throughput or a compression-bomb benchmark.
No native Windows/WSL2, real paid Provider, real manga model, or external epubcheck run was performed.
